mnemonics.title: 2PL Phases
mnemonics.content: Grow Then Shrink - First acquire all locks (Grow), then release all locks (Shrink)

mnemonics.title: Timestamp Ordering Rules
mnemonics.content: Read Late, Write Late - If reading, timestamp must be ≥ write timestamp; if writing, timestamp must be ≥ read timestamp and write timestamp

mnemonics.title: Optimistic Concurrency Phases
mnemonics.content: Read, Validate, Write - First read data, then validate for conflicts, finally write if valid
